title: Cobblemon: Sculked Mons
body:
# A call from ancient times
This add-on will add Skulk-infested Pokémon forms

# Features
Form added
・Regigigas
He spawns near Skulk Shriekers in the Deep Dark.
Also, Regigigas can become infected by feeding him a Sculk Shrieker.
Furthermore, it can be crafted by placing a Nether Star and a Sculk Shrieker in a Restorer. 

This addon(datapack) is very early stage
